> ℹ️ **This is a curated marketplace.** Pull requests that add new plugins or
> new `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` entries from external contributors will
> be closed — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md). Docs, typo, CI, and
> bug-fix PRs are welcome.

## Type of change

- [ ] Docs / typo fix
- [ ] Bug fix in an existing plugin
- [ ] CI / infrastructure
- [ ] Other

## Summary

<!-- What changes, and why. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `claude plugin validate .` passes locally
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (if the change is user-facing)
- [ ] Plugin `README.md` updated (if behavior changed)
- [ ] `version` bumped (if an existing plugin changed)
